headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Risk Off Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: Investors turn to high dividend-yielding stocks in turbulent markets. Benzinga offers latest analyst ratings and accuracy data for top consumer staples stocks.
